---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  contents: projects
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

Selected projects and experiments. Each links out to its repo, paper, or write-up.
